headline: Allstate Analysts Increase Their Forecasts Following Q1 Earnings
summary: Allstate Corp (NYSE:ALL) reported mixed Q1 results, beating earnings estimates but missing on sales. Analysts have mixed opinions, with PTs ranging from $226 to $268.

raw.headline: Allstate Analysts Increase Their Forecasts Following Q1 Earnings
raw.summary: Allstate Corp (NYSE:ALL) reported mixed Q1 results, beating earnings estimates but missing on sales. Analysts have mixed opinions, with PTs ranging from $226 to $268.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Allstate, Raises Price Target to $226
summary: Citigroup  analyst Matthew Heimermann   maintains Allstate (NYSE:ALL) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $221 to $226.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Allstate, Raises Price Target to $226
raw.summary: Citigroup  analyst Matthew Heimermann   maintains Allstate (NYSE:ALL) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $221 to $226.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Allstate, Raises Price Target to $268
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   maintains Allstate (NYSE:ALL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $252 to $268.

headline: Allstate Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Allstate (NYSE:ALL) executives pointed to what CEO Thomas J. Wilson called “excellent operating results” in the first quarter of 2026, highlighting improved underwriting performance, higher investment income, and increased capital returns to shareholders.
